procs.details: Temporarily increase your attack speed and physical damage.
Gather your inner darkness and unleash a powerful piercing shadow bolt that deals arcane damage to monsters on its path. The shadow bolt slows down after hitting a target.
Unleash a falling blood moon exploding into smaller moons which explode into smaller moons dealing magic damage.
Launch a piercing bone spear dealing arcane damage.
Corrupt the ground in the target area inflicting poison break on monsters affected area.
Conjures a traveling orb of thunder shocking nearby monsters with chainlightning.
Unleash a swarm of flying crows dealing fire damage on a large radius inflicting burning on hit.

Perform a long ranged lance attack piercing monsters in a line dealing physical damage. If the lance comes in contact with a commending banner you get dragged to the banner smashing the ground stunning monsters on impact.
Send plague rats in target direction dealing poison damage on impact.
Throw a bottle of moonshine that ignites the impacted area on fire and sends out burning oil.
Launch a barrage of homing missiles which seeks down its target dealing area of effect arcane and physical damage.
Temporarily increase your arcane skill damage and cast rate.
Cast a freezing blizzard dealing area of effect cold damage and freezing monsters in the target area.
Pulls all monsters in front of you dealing physical damage
Throw your weapon dealing increased damage
Send forward a shockwave of bone spikes dealing physical damage.
Summon a pool of corrupted water on target location bursting into a massive torrent that knocks up monsters struck dealing cold damage.
Cast a frost enhanced shield on yourself reducing incoming physical damage, freezing and dealing cold damage to monsters that attack you.
Pick up and throw a monster which deals area of effect arcane damage and stuns monsters upon landing.
Cast to instantly restore some Mana.
Throw a shredder on the ground spinning with deadly speed dealing physical damage.
Move through the ether for a short distance instantaneously
Reduces your movement speed and all resistances
Unleash a powerful area of effect spell dealing arcane damage
Channel waves of fractal energy on the target monster sending pulses out dealing arcane damage to nearby monsters.
Call down bolts of thunder striking all monsters around the target dealing Lightning damage
Perform a burst attack dealing increased damage, additional poison damage and inflicting Poisoned on hit.
Strikes have a chance to explode toxic fissures on all monsters around you dealing poison damage and inflicting Poisoned.
Perform an attack that releases a wave of shadow dealing physical damage.
Summon Grim Reaper´s scythe and throw with deadly force dealing Elemental damage.
Throw pieces of fresh hot kebab meat dealing damage and setting monsters on fire.
Cast down an asteroid from the sky dealing cold damage when landing.
Perform an attack dealing physical damage and  lightning damage that rebounds to the closest monster.
Instantly restores a portion of your mana.
Flail a big chained spike ball dealing physical damage to monsters on its path.
Activates your third eye for a short period, shocking any nearby monsters with chain lightning dealing arcane damage
Temporarily turn into a demon gaining increased attack damage and attack speed.
Cast a high voltage thunder bolt on target spot stunning and dealing massive area of effect damage.
Strikes have a chance to explode toxic fissures on all monsters around you dealing poison damage and inflicting Poisoned.
Breathe glacial air freezing and dealing cold damage to monsters.
Perform an attack that releases a wave of shadow dealing physical damage.
